# Security Policy

VANTA Boutique is a demo / portfolio project and is **not intended for production
use as-is** — it includes mock payments, demo credentials, and sample data.

If you find a security issue in this repository, please report it privately via
[GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/grvtech1/VANTA-Boutique/security/advisories/new).
For non-sensitive issues, open a regular
[GitHub issue](https://github.com/grvtech1/VANTA-Boutique/issues). I'll review and
respond as time allows.
